title: ReviewResult
description: Typed output schema for the Code Review workflow artifact. Embedded as <!-- caretta:review_result {...} --> in the PR review body so downstream workflows and tooling can parse the verdict and finding count without screen-scraping the review comments.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the review agent run completed (e.g. "2026-05-15T10:30:00Z").

pr_number.description: Pull request number that was reviewed.

finding_count.description: Total number of inline review findings (all severities).
